Khách hàng đánh giá cao các tiện nghi tại Fairmont Resort & Spa Blue Mountains - MGallery by Sofitel, với điểm số 8.5/10. Các tiện nghi tại đây được mô tả là đẹp, tiện nghi và đáng giá. Điều này cho thấy khách hàng đã có những trải nghiệm tuyệt vời với các tiện nghi hiện đại và chất lượng tại khách sạn.

Khách hàng cũng đánh giá cao vị trí của khách sạn, với điểm số 8.8/10. Với vị trí tuyệt vời tại Blue Mountains, khách sạn nằm gần các điểm tham quan nổi tiếng và cung cấp cho khách hàng một không gian yên tĩnh và tuyệt đẹp để thư giãn.

sample_comments.text:
Chúng tôi thực sự rất thích kỳ nghỉ của mình - đến nỗi bọn trẻ không muốn về nhà! Bữa sáng thật tuyệt vời, với sự chào đón rất nồng nhiệt từ nhân viên. Chúng tôi đã tận hưởng bể bơi trong nhà, jacuzzi, khu vực trẻ em, và các hoạt động có phí như trượt băng, đánh trượt khổng lồ và đi thuyền motor nước. 
Phòng và cảnh quan thật tuyệt vời, với các tiện nghi chu đáo như trạm nạp nước trên mỗi tầng và thời gian trả phòng lúc 11 giờ sáng rất dễ dàng. Một vài tiếng ồn ở hành lang và mùi thảm nhẹ là những vấn đề nhỏ. Hầu hết nhân viên đều thân thiện và nhiệt tình, mặc dù một nhân viên lễ tân (người Ấn Độ/Nepal) thì không được chào đón cho lắm. 
Món đồ chơi vịt miễn phí cho trẻ em và chỗ đậu xe miễn phí cho các thành viên là những điểm cộng tuyệt vời. Tổng thể, đây là một kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời và chúng tôi sẽ rất vui mừng trở lại.
sample_comments.title: Kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời cho gia đình với nhiều hoạt động và tiện nghi tuyệt vời
sample_comments.response:
Dear Maria,

Thank you for sharing your delightful feedback regarding your recent stay with us. We are thrilled to hear that your family enjoyed the various activities and amenities, including the breakfast and the indoor pool, which contributed to a memorable experience. It is gratifying to know that the thoughtful amenities, such as the water refill stations and convenient checkout time, added to your comfort.

We appreciate your comments regarding the noise in the hallway and the carpet odor. While we strive to maintain a pleasant environment, we acknowledge that occasional disturbances may occur. Additionally, we will take note of your feedback concerning the reception staff member to ensure our service remains consistently welcoming.

We are pleased that you found value in the complimentary duck toy and parking for members. Thank you once again for your kind words. We look forward to welcoming you and your family back for another wonderful stay.

Kind regards,
Guest Relations Team

sample_comments.text: Mặc dù chỉ ở lại một ngày, nhưng cả cơ thể và tâm trí của tôi đều cảm thấy thoải mái. Số lượng tiện ích tôi đã sử dụng không nhiều, nhưng đây là một khu nghỉ dưỡng khách sạn tuyệt vời với sự bảo trì tốt. Nếu có xe, đây là một vị trí thuận tiện để di chuyển, nhưng từ Sublime lookout đến trung tâm Leura chỉ mất khoảng 5 phút bằng taxi (khoảng 13 AUD), đi bộ thì khoảng 30 phút. Cảnh đẹp buổi sáng từ sảnh khách sạn rất ấn tượng.
sample_comments.title: Không gian thoải mái
sample_comments.response:
Dear Yoko,

Thank you for your kind words regarding your recent stay with us. We are thrilled to hear that you found our resort comfortable and well-maintained. It's delightful to know that you enjoyed the early morning view from our lobby and appreciated the convenience of our location. We truly value your feedback and hope to welcome you back for a longer visit to enjoy more of our facilities in the future.

Kind Regards,
Guest Relations Team
Fairmont Resort Blue Mountains

sample_comments.title: Absolutely rubbish and not worth $500 stay nor carry the Fairmont standard.
sample_comments.negatives:
- Staff are mostly new (maybe even casual?), and not trained well. They just respond with strict fact without offering any helpful suggestion. 
- It's quite obvious they are under staff and don't get anything done. Eg., asking for towel or toiletries took 6 hours to get delivered. 
- Parking is hard/difficult
- Facilities are old and not maintained properly.

sample_comments.title: Unauthorized charges
sample_comments.text: Unreasonably charge to my credit card without informing me, claiming they cannot get it sorted out with agoda and just charging unknown charges to me. This happened more than 1.5 months after i checked out and had paid fully for the rooms back then. Extremely bad for such a known hotel.
sample_comments.response:

We believe this has now been rectified and apologise for any confusion,
The Fairmont Resort & Spa Team

sample_comments.title: I would not recommend to anyone to stay there
sample_comments.positives: The view and location
sample_comments.negatives: The service as there was no customer focus at all

sample_comments.title: Unknown charges after more than 1 month
sample_comments.text: Suddenly received an unposted charge on my credit card after more than 1 month of staying, where i have already paid for it long ago.

sample_comments.title: Not Romantic, Not Luxury. Kids only.
sample_comments.positives: IF we had kids, maybe this would be a place to keep them busy. They had indoor ice rink, pony rides, face painting, rock painting, mini train ride if weather is good.
sample_comments.negatives: It was kind of unclean, gross. There was room service left outside of rooms for nearly 24 hours. The view is almost not existent. There is a colorful 100+ yards kids slide in the Mountain View. Notice that all the resort pictures are from the sky and above. Don't be fooled. This is not a romantic or luxury place. The breakfast buffet was like a kids daycare. The tennis courts are carpet and not maintained. If it rains, it would be days before the tennis carpet dries. There was hardly any water available, the water containers were never filled. He menus were very sticky I guess from the kids.

sample_comments.title: Too expensive and you get nothing
sample_comments.text:
They claim that they offer good break for family with kids but we you get there 
1. Too many residents and too little staff so nothing get done on time
2. Kids activities, either not working or poorly run. And on top of the very expensive cost per night you still have to pay for every single kids activities, that if anything worse to be done
3. Rooms and facilities are 200 years old 

2nd time there, but never again

sample_comments.title: Overpriced and disappointing, unclean dining areas, unsuitable for anyone except large families
sample_comments.positives: Comfortable room
sample_comments.negatives:
The price we paid was far too high for the quality of the facilities and services provided. 
I would not recommend booking here unless you are a large family, as the experience did not meet our expectations. 
We specifically chose this hotel believing that all amenities would be conveniently on-site, but were disappointed to find that the spa closed early at 5pm and one bar was permanently shut. 
The pool area was overcrowded with children, making it quite uninviting. 
Finally, breakfast was a very unpleasant experience - the dining area was extremely dirty, with food scattered on the floor and uncleaned tables. 
Overall, I was dissatisfied with both the service and the overall value for money.

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.text: Our room was dirty when we arrived, including poo stains in the toilet and used tissues on the bedside table, additionally our tv wasn't working and it took them 2 days to fix. A number of the activities were out of order and they were understaffed for how busy it is during the school holidays, to be fair the staff that were there were pleasant and hard working.

sample_comments.title: Not worth for the money.
sample_comments.positives: Great location
sample_comments.negatives:
Facilities are old, and breakfast is very limited 
We requested to add a sofa bed and had to call customer service to ask for bed sheet etc.

sample_comments.title: Cleanliness pending improvement
sample_comments.text: Feels a bit odd on the Receptionists, cleanliness of room pending improvement
sample_comments.response:

Thank you for taking the time to send through feedback on your recent stay. I am sorry that we did not meet your expectations. 

We will certainly take this feedback on board and thank you for taking the time to send this through.

Kind Regards,

Fairmont Resort Blue Mountains

sample_comments.title: poor to average, not worth the cost
sample_comments.positives: Room was adequate
sample_comments.negatives: The carpet in room was very poor and in need of repair

sample_comments.title: One word: run
sample_comments.text: It's great location with great views but that's it. Really old property and we had bed bugs plus a leaky roof
sample_comments.response:
Dear Tara,

Thank you for taking the time to send through feedback on your recent stay. I am sorry that we did not meet your expectations. 

We will certainly take this feedback on board and thank you for taking the time to send this through. As we had discussed with you at the time, we were unable to locate any bed bugs in the room you occupied, but thank you again for the feedback.

Kind Regards,

Fairmont Resort Blue Mountains

sample_comments.title: Big property but outdated facilities
sample_comments.positives: Liked the location of hotel which is 5 min drive from leura village. Indoor heated swimming pool and buffet breakfast was decent with mesmerizing view of mountains. Bed and pillow was comfortable and clean bathroom. Staffs in the breakfast, concierge, housekeeping were really warm and greeted when seen.
sample_comments.negatives:
Facilities in the entire hotel was extremely outdated and when I say it, you will see many areas barricaded due to out of use, chipped walls/tiles in most places so doesnt give you the resort kind of ambience and wasnt value for the money we paid. 

All the Game rooms for kids had a very damp smell, looked like wasnt managed well, wasnt well ventilated so we didnt spend any time there even though my son wanted to due to the smell. The TV in our room had Option of buying movies and it was accidentally subscribed by my kid as it was just a click to subscribe it, no card payment nothing required and when told the same during checkout, we still had to pay 35 dollars for the accident. Front office staff didnt seem really welcoming during checkin or checkout. They could do more when welcoming guests and bidding goodbye as they are the face of hotel and not once the staff asked us how the stay was or anything which was very unusual. The hotel certainly wont be on my list to come back, a bit disappointing.

sample_comments.title: Booking mixed up
sample_comments.text: I booked 2 nights for 2 rooms. I also called the hotel to ensure these 2 rooms are adjacent to each other and they have arranged for that. When I checked in, the other room was booked for a wrong date in their system so I had to wait for a long time before we can settle in the room. The room was also not clean, there were left over ice cream in the freezer, missing teaspoon for coffee, incomplete tea. The next day, the hotel key did not work as their system is again reflecting wrong date.

sample_comments.title: Disappointing
sample_comments.positives: Great facilities for the kids
sample_comments.negatives:
There were bed bugs. My kids and I shared a king size bed and our bodies were all covered in raised red lumps by the end of the trip. I raised this with reception and was kindly given zyrtec and immediately told a room change was not possible over my 3 night stay as rooms were all booked out. 
I also gave notice of needing a shower chair for my disabled daughter and was assured there'll be one organised upon my arrival, there wasn't one in the bathroom. I called reception and they said they'll bring one straight away only to receive a call a few minutes informing me the shower chair isn't available, a step was provided instead, clearly not a substitute for someone who cannot stand. I then requested for a small stool I could place inside the bathtub, was told he'd go and check and then never heard back again. I didn't bother calling back.
The bathtub is also extremely slippery and a rubber mat was also not available upon asking causing a slip accident and bruised leg.

sample_comments.title: A glorified and unsupervised kindergarten
sample_comments.text:
the check in which was an hour late at 4.00pm
In house dining where there is no table in the room and only one chair. 
Very limited menu in the restaurant 
Breakfast is like an unsupervised kindergarten where screaming kids run a mom , the room is filthy with food scraps all over the floor and tables left dirty. 
Concierge when approached for guidance hands out brochures and tells you to call the operator directly or book on line. Absolutely no assistance or advice 
The rooms are barely cleaned with no attention to detail. The spa was left with soap leftover from previous evening. 
Parking is available but need to walk over 5 minutes to get to reception without any cover on rainy day. 
Umbrella's not provided

Overall the most disappointing and frustrating hotel experience. 

Will never ever come back again
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe King Room with Spa Bath

sample_comments.title: A total let down despite the hard working staff.
sample_comments.positives: The location and views of the mountains are beautiful. The staff are excellent
sample_comments.negatives: The property is old and tired and desperately needs refurbishment. The rooms are poor and the beds are utterly unacceptable. Criminal to charge people to sleep in these beds. The property is bizarre in its opening and closing times with many venues closed completely or closing very early. Room service menu is a joke and not available after 9pm. Potential here is huge but let down by Accor and hotel management despite the bar and wait staff being awesome and doing their best.

sample_comments.title: Expensive and very poor service
sample_comments.text:
We stayed there for one night and were really disappointed. Check in at 9pm, first of all, you need to unload the luggage anbd no one is there to help, and there is a long corridor from the road to the hallway... No concierge available so you really have to do all by yourself.
When you see the standing of the hotel it isnt very normal.
Second we asked for a babycot that was never brought to the room.
At 9.30pm we couldnt eat anywhere except for the room service, where you could only order a very small pizza for a very expensive amount! We were very disppointed by the poor service. One person at the check in only, no one to help with luggage when check in/out...
Not very convenient when you are with kids and only have 2 hands
Will not go back again

sample_comments.title: Poor hospitality, dated hotel, amazing location
sample_comments.positives: The location is spectacular
sample_comments.negatives:
We stayed during school holidays and had just road tripped from Victoria. All we wanted was a nice meal and a good sleep. When we arrived the restaurant was booked out and we were told only room service was available. The bar/lounge stops serving food at 5pm. The room service menu looked ok - but then when we tried to place an order nobody would pick up the phone. My wife walked to the front desk (who also wouldn't pick up the phone) only to be told that room service was pizza only! Three other guests were at the front desk going through the same experience. We were told we could drive into the local town!!!

The whole hospitality experience was understaffed and not befitting of a hotel or resort experience.

sample_comments.title: Disappointing, hallway had old carpets. not up to
sample_comments.text: Disappointing, hotel was not up to expection. Was told by hotel staff they re not affiliated with Fairmonts hotel in Canad. Not worth the price for a resort hotel.
sample_comments.positives: Big lobby, location

sample_comments.title: Definitely not value for money. A fallen star.
sample_comments.positives: Sadly, very little. I had been there a few years ago for a coffee and thought it was stunning. All that beauty was lost due to a myriad of issues. I can say the shower was hot, so that was good.
sample_comments.negatives: Right from the beginning, the service was poor. Nobody available to help with bags, a thousand children running wild around the foyer, the Airconditioning was freezing, the paint was chipped all along the skirtings, the distant views were wonderful, but looked over dry grass with no landscaping and patches of dirt, the breakfast room has glass windows to take in the 'view' that have a massive solid metal bar across the middle of the glass which blocks the view. We waited 40 minutes for a coffee and a cup of tea at the cafe, had to clear coffee cups from the pool table to play a game... all in all, a big disappointment.

sample_comments.title: Under the pump
sample_comments.text:
Great facilities, fun activities and location
But we found used spoons in the room, not washed..no soap dispenser and we had to call 3 times to get a dental kit..overall don't feel five star at all. The used spoons were definitely a put off

sample_comments.title: Disappointing to see such a lovely property so run down. The staff should be commended for their commitment to customer
sample_comments.positives: Location & staff so helpful.
sample_comments.negatives: Run down, needs painting, pool looked dirty & maintenance overall of property obviously not happened. Holes in room curtains, paint peeling on all surfaces outside. One gate to pool had hoses running across it which dangerous. Signage to facilitates inadequate. Food almost inedible from room service, ambience in Embers restaurant lacking.

sample_comments.title: Need update
sample_comments.text: We went there for family short trip (we are 5 of us with 8 yo, 5yo, 2yo). with another young family. I called hotel to ask about something, but the staff on the phone was not helpful and friendly either. All the other staff in the hotel were generally not friendly except concierge and a staff for kids ride. The room was clean but bits and pieces were old. And needed updated like shower. Switch button for tap and shower wasn't work, had to pull the button all the time to fill up bath. We saw rubbish on corridors and people's used towels all the time. Asked a cleaner to change towels only, but another cleaner came and made bed. Most of activities for kids costed extra cost. Not enough explanation for activities we could do in the hotel. Pool towels were not available for long time, we had to wait for them to come. The breakfast wasn't impressive experience compared to the price we paid. All over, little bit disappointed experience.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Eiko,

Thank you for sharing your feedback about your recent stay. We apologize for the inconvenience and disappointment you experienced during your visit.

It's concerning to hear about the unfriendly service you encountered from some of our staff members. Providing exceptional customer service is a top priority for us, and your comments will be addressed with our team to ensure improvements are made.

We are pleased to know that you found the room clean, but we regret that certain amenities, such as the shower, did not meet your expectations. Maintenance issues like the faulty switch button should not have occurred, and we will ensure this is promptly fixed.

We appreciate your feedback and hope to have the opportunity to provide you with a more enjoyable and memorable stay in the future. Thank you for bringing these matters to our attention.

Kind Regards,

Rory Douglas
Executive Assistant Manager

sample_comments.title: Room furniture is dated , don't even provide basic stuff like water , slippers . Tooth brush . When asked for it some ne
sample_comments.positives: Location is okay
sample_comments.negatives: Old in need of renovation

sample_comments.title: This is a motel disguised as a resort
sample_comments.text: If you are used to resorts in Asia, this place is a motel by those standards. They have most of.the things shuton weekends (pony ride, train ride, half the restaurants) and even their breakfast buffet is more that of a star hotel (self service literally and barely any vegan options). Staff is friendly but this is really as bare bones as a resort can get. The indoor heated pool was barely warm, thought my kids caught cold from there. The room service and housekeeping never pick up the phone, had to request for extra towels and slippers and dental kits (when its a room for 4, wonder why they skimp on basics like these). Only saving grace is hop on hop off bus has a stop here. Recommend staying in katoomba or some place which is closer to the town centre.
sample_comments.response:

sample_comments.title: Good for families

The Location isn't near anything so you need a car.
The majority of facilities are child / family focussed (not us). The reception staff didn't have a clue about what was on the property. Even though they checked with a supervisor, they still misdirected us when we asked where to walk or to view sunset. 

Breakfast which was a major reason we booked here was thought by all to be a shambles We were all complaining as we waited to swoop if something delivered &.the Teensy thimble of avocado scraped empty for 2 days all morning was a joke & not replenished.

There was not a thing gourmet (Scones were as hard as a rock. 2 star was not what we paid for. Stay elsewhere and visit real local providers who are highly recommended. Especially the pies!
We had to sit far away in an area we ere first told e couldn't sit to get away from the screaming out of control children

Old, dirty carpet and couch.
Thin walls.
Very expensive for very little but not much choice in the area.

sample_comments.title: Acceptable

sample_comments.negatives:
The rooms were filthy and dated 
The hotel is dated and dirty 
The staff are miserable

sample_comments.title: Filthy
sample_comments.text: The resort was absolutely filthy. No cleaning in any area

sample_comments.title: Would not go back
sample_comments.positives: The breakfast was OK
sample_comments.negatives: No follow up from staff on requests. Felt like there was no level of interest in customer service.

sample_comments.title: Very disappointed!
sample_comments.text:
Booked for Christmas in July but we're told that it was booked out. We ate in The other restaurant that was very expensive a not worth a cent! The scallops were hard to find through piles of crumb and were well over cooked and tasteless. The two king prawns had virtually no meat left as they too were overcooked and Were not deveined.
The room was clean but the toilet seat was all scratched up and didn't flush properly and the shower head wouldn't stay up.
Two nights with no sleep from people next door partying on the balcony outside our window and the constant shouting from people in the hall.
I must compliment the staff though! They were polite and helpful but that isn't enough to make us ever go back.

sample_comments.title: Noisy.
sample_comments.positives: Breakfast buffet very comprehensive
sample_comments.negatives: The facility is completely geared towards families and children. Nearly no accommodation is made for adults without children. The place is overrun with children running, screaming and making mess. The common areas, restaurants, breakfast etc are unbearably loud, crowded and messy courtesy of kids and families who expect the facility to accommodate their brood. There are few places for adults to go to have quiet drink and meal or watch sport, without the carnage of hordes of children.

sample_comments.title: Noisy and bad room
sample_comments.text: Could hear all the noise from the room next door and all corridor noise. our heating wasnt working and engineer came twice. couldnt move room as they were booked out. had to get a oil heater put in our room. the shower head was broken. had to get a new one installed. Breakfast buffet really not up to scratch, nothing tasted good and the poached eggs and omelettes werent cooked right. i wouldnt stay here again.

sample_comments.title: pleasant but old and run down
sample_comments.negatives:
no restaurants are open during the week and the only few that are you have to book in advance the food
isn't the greatest

sample_comments.title: Very rude reception staff
sample_comments.text:
The overall condition of the hotel is acceptable. However, there were instances of cleanliness issues, particularly within the room. It seems the hotel may be understaffed for effectively cleaning such a large property.
A significant drawback was the unhelpful attitude of the reception staff. He was dismissive of my inquiries and appeared rushed. I felt that my concerns were not adequately addressed. The guy who is in charge of our luggage was lovely though.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Evia,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We're truly sorry to hear about your experience at check-in, and we sincerely apologize for the unhelpful attitude you encountered from the reception staff. This is certainly not the standard we strive for, and we will address this matter with our team to ensure that all of our guests are treated with the respect and attentiveness they deserve.

We also appreciate you bringing the cleanliness issues to our attention. We take these concerns seriously, and we will review our staffing levels and cleaning procedures to ensure that all areas of the hotel meet the high standards we aim to maintain.

On a positive note, we're glad to hear that the luggage team provided you with a warm and helpful service. We'll make sure to pass on your kind words to them.

Thank you again for your feedback. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back in the future and provide you with a much more seamless and pleasant experience.

Warm

sample_comments.title: The resort has great potential, but it falls short of its promises.
sample_comments.positives: I enjoyed the property's location. The room was clean and the bed was comfortable. The breakfast was delicious and the views were great.
sample_comments.negatives: The heated pool was freezing, the sauna only reached 60 degrees, and the jacuzzi (spa) was cold. There was an unpleasant, pungent smell throughout the hotel. The food at the restaurants was mediocre, except for the waffle chips and breakfast. The hotel staff was unresponsive when I called them.

sample_comments.title: Fairmount Resorts blue mountains
sample_comments.text:
There's not much options I'm menu
With the in room dining, restaurant is quite expensive rooms are a bit dated carpets and furniture .
Room rates expensive for what you get 
Carpet has stain , mirrors has marks it was not cleaned properly.

sample_comments.title: Fair value for school holiday period
sample_comments.positives: Lots of kids activities on during school holidays, although the train was out of action for repairs.
sample_comments.negatives: The room description for standard rooms does not explicitly state that the shower is over a bathtub. This was not suitable for elderly or people with mobility issues. There were often no towels available at the swimming pool. There were limited menu options at the lounge bar, room service or family-friendly restaurant; mostly pizza, pasta or deep-fried options. The air-conditioning did not seem to be operating in the lounge bar on a 36 degree day.

sample_comments.title: I'd say go stay near the town and not in resort...
sample_comments.text: I'd rather stay near the bay and there's nothing to do here... not worth a stay...
