sample_comments.positives: Beautiful view and lovely service.
sample_comments.negatives: There's a garbage collection area just below our room window.

sample_comments.title: Pros and Cons - for Family with Young Children
sample_comments.text:
We stayed at Fairmont Resort with 3 other families, with children under 12. 
Positives: 
- Two queen beds in a room to accommodate a family of four
- Big resort with many things to do 
- The kids love the playgrounds and the indoor pool
- The cinema is surprisingly quite big and nice

Negatives: 
- Hotel is quite dated, don't expect modern feel and look. The carpet is old with stains
- Cleanliness could be better. We found a lolly on the floor and hair in the bathroom
- Staff are not very friendly
- All other rooms have bath robes and slippers, but we had none
- I am not a fan of a shower bath with a fixed shower head. It is kind of dangerous
- The wall is very thin, can easily hear next-door people talking 
- Outdoor swimming pool is too cold

Overall it was a nice stay and the kids had lots of fun. May stay again if the hotel rooms are renovated. Staff should also be more friendly.

sample_comments.title: Great, did the job. We'll be back.

sample_comments.negatives: The room was dated.

sample_comments.title: disappointment!
sample_comments.text: the quality and spread of breakfast is basic and worse than before Covid. Also, section of prime area in the restaurant is reserved for gold members! sigh!

sample_comments.title: Very Relaxing Space
sample_comments.text:
We were in Katoomba and needed a place to stay for Easter Weekend. We searched online, booked and caught a taxi to the resort. It was easy, simple and intuitive. 
Checking in was breeze and we found our room in minutes. It was very clean, lovely attention to detail, there was no facial tissue box in the room, not sure why! Also, one of the three restaurants was closed, that didn't make sense on Easter! Others needed booking! Not convenient when you just dropped in!
There was a fabulous family atmosphere to the place, tennis courts, ponds, outdoor settings and horse riding!
We enjoyed our stay very much yet there was no shuttle to take us back to nearby sights or train station! Unusual for this well known chain not to have a courtesy shuttle for guests!

sample_comments.title: I will be back for my kids birthday
sample_comments.positives:
Facilities and kids friendly, the movie package offer variety of movies. It's a really good resort.
It has newly built ice skating, a lot of playground for kids it's really nice. I will be back
sample_comments.negatives: Price for the food in the restaurant is a bit pricey.

sample_comments.title: Amazing location but quite disappointed with cleanliness and restaurant
sample_comments.text: The place is just amazing, facilities superb. They provided a microwave to heat baby food. However, we were quite disappointed with the restaurant. We were waiting 1 hour for food which was mediocre. The cleanliness was the issue. One towel had a big yellow stain. We stayed 2 night and the room was not cleaned after the 1st night.

sample_comments.title: Fun
sample_comments.positives: All the fun activities for kids and diff restaurants
sample_comments.negatives: Pool was a bit cold

sample_comments.title: Nice place
sample_comments.text: Enjoyed staying here. Big property with lots to do but it feels a bit run down.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Joseph
Thank you for your review and rating, we are so pleased you enjoyed your stay here with us. and enjoyed the extensive resort facilities.
I apologise that you found the resort a bit run down. You will be pleased to know we are currently undergoing a large and carefully thought out rejuvenation programme for the resort. This includes substantial capital being placed into both the accommodation rooms as well as public facilities. While much of this has been complete (including brand new beds placed in every room, new Sony TVs and carpets) there remains some work to be done including the outdoor swimming pool being completely revamped in time for Summer, as well as a brand new indoor gymnasium, teenage retreat room and refurbished tennis courts with additional sporting equipment. Excitingly, we are also opening a 16 treatment room Day Spa facility on Monday 13th August! We are confident you will note continued improvements on a return stay with us. Kind regards, The Fairmot

sample_comments.title: Great place to stay for a blue mountains visit
sample_comments.positives: Cleanliness, friendly staff, comfortable bed
sample_comments.negatives: Location was fine, but a bit of a walk into town

sample_comments.title: "Not Happy Jan"
sample_comments.text: The inadequate parking is a joke, and there was not 1 space available. In the end we had to park in a painted no parking zone. We asked for some dessert and a drink at 10:15pm and were told this was NOT available via in room dining, in fact nothing was. No room service is a big down side for me. We were woken at 7:40am Sunday morning to screaming kids in the hallways singing Happy Birthday. All up this was my second poor experience here. We had decided to give it another go after the mistaken belief the M Gallery / Sofitel would have ironed out the problems of the past. After completing the customer service survey, we were offered a room upgrade and breakfast for our "next stay". Sadly there won't be a "next stay". Presumptuous to assume there would be. Do yourself a favour. Book somewhere else.

sample_comments.title: Perfect place to stay.
sample_comments.positives:
A fabulous place to stay. The concierge staff were absolutely wonderful, very helpful nothing seemed to be a bother and always a smile, we were very grateful for their help with our luggage. The breakfast was great, plenty to choose from, again the staff were friendly and helpful, plus great views from restaurant.

The suit was very roomy and I wish I could take the bed home with me, it was so comfy. Very clean and always made up daily.
What a great idea to have a model train set up, this went over well with the children that were staying there and also not forgetting the "Big Kids". This is a credit to John, who I understands maintains this set up. This was an unexpected interactive display. Thank you to all the Staff for making our stay memorable.
sample_comments.negatives: Nothing - Perfect

sample_comments.title: Good for young family
sample_comments.text:
Loved it! We had breakfast with beautiful mountain view. The train runs on Friday afternoon, and may be weekend as well, i'm not sure. So make sure you stay on Friday if you want your little one to have a little bit of fun. Too bad we missed it. 

I have to say that they have the best hotel porters, they're polite, helpful and very informative. 

Only 10 mins drive to three sisters.

sample_comments.title: Good stay.
sample_comments.text:
Very busy. Too busy to go anywhere in the hotel for dinner or sit and have a drink at the bar. Would of loved to relax in front of the fire.

Good for kids. Train rides, indoor pool and play rooms. 

Staff polite and friendly.

Rooms a good size. An exhaust fan in bathroom would have been good. Mould in bathroom.

Didn't expect to see dogs allowed. 2 dogs in small court yard off a room near us. Not happy to hear them barking at 3am.

sample_comments.title: Luxurious, quiet and exactly what we were after.
sample_comments.positives: The Jenolan Suite was luxurious and beautifully situated with a view over the bushes outside. It was quiet, comfortable and gave us room to work and rest between adventures around the Blue Mountains. It was one of those once in a lifetime stays where we wanted to experience something beautiful and upmarket without the pretentiousness - and this property fit the bill exactly. Staff are extremely helpful, professional and non-intrusive. The perfect mix. The buffet breakfast was extensive. And even though the restaurant was very busy due to an on-site conference, the food was plentiful and we didn't have to wait for anything. The access to the billliards room was easy via reception and provided a really nice relaxation for us after using the gym, which although well-equipped had quite a few items missing, such as attachments for pulley exercises. Otherwise it was excellent.
sample_comments.negatives: Nothing comes to mind.

sample_comments.title: Good value for money
sample_comments.text: It was nice and relaxing with plenty of things to do for our toddler. It was our second stay there. I would recommend it to young families.
sample_comments.positives: Children activities, great view, good service

sample_comments.title: Unforgettable Easter Family getaway
sample_comments.positives:
Amazing facilities - such a relaxing place for families with kids. 

Fee cinema with kids movies every 2 hours definitely saved our sanity. Plus Ice Skating Rink, indoor playgrounds and arcade games, amazing pool with SPA and sauna, outdoor rainbow slide...

Wonderful Easter Egg Hunt organised by the Hotel and mouthwatering Easter BBQ made our family Easter stay totally unforgettable!
sample_comments.negatives: The water pipes were quite noisy - especially at 6am when guests from other rooms were taking showers...

We wanted to change a room, but due to the busy time of the year, they couldn't give us another room,we only got two drink vouchers instead. Room was big with great blue mountain view.

sample_comments.title: Mixed Feelings
sample_comments.text: This seemed like the top hotel in Leura and at USD250, I thought I'd give it a try. It turned out to be alright. The room had been refurbished but the bathroom was too plain. I'm not saying it should be gold-plated, but simplicity and elegance can co-exist. Hansar Bangkok is an example with a great bathroom. Back to Fairmont, don't expect the facilities to be of 5-star. The changing room + sauna = something like that of a local government playground standard. The entire resort is quite old but they refurbished a lot of the stuff, yet not 100% of the stuff. The buffet breakfast made me happy. After all, I didn't get to explore the resort too much given the lack of time.

sample_comments.title: I expected more but room is a bit old.
sample_comments.text: We stayed only for one night, we end up only resting in the room after the long hours of flight and train travel to Sydney then Blue Mountains. embedding_text:
Fairmont Resort & Spa Blue Mountains - MGallery by Sofitel - khách sạn 4.0 sao tại Blue Mountains.
Địa chỉ: 1 Sublime Point Road, Leura, Blue Mountains, Úc.
Đỗ xe và Wi-Fi luôn miễn phí, vì vậy quý khách có thể giữ liên lạc, đến và đi tùy ý. Nằm ở vị trí trung tâm tại Leura của Blue Mountains, chỗ nghỉ này đặt quý khách ở gần các điểm thu hút và tùy chọn ăn uống thú vị. Được xếp hạng 4 sao, chỗ nghỉ chất lượng cao này cho phép khách nghỉ sử dụng bể bơi trong nhà, mát-xa và bể bơi ngoài trời ngay trong khuôn viên.
Tiện ích: Bi-a, Bàn làm việc, Bàn tiếp tân [24 giờ], Bãi đỗ xe [miễn phí], Bãi đỗ xe [tại chỗ], Bình chữa cháy, Bóng bàn, Bảng phi tiêu, Bảo vệ [24 giờ], Bếp, Bể bơi, Bể bơi [trong nhà], Bể bơi [trẻ em], Bể bơi [ngoài trời], Bồn tắm nước nóng, Bữa sáng, Bữa sáng [tự chọn], Bữa ăn cho trẻ, CCTV bên ngoài chỗ nghỉ, CCTV trong khu vực chung, Chuyến du lịch, Các loại khăn, Cách bày bàn ăn an toàn, Có cung cấp hóa đơn, Có thể yêu cầu không khử trùng phòng, Cơ sở vật chất cho họp mặt/tiệc lớn, Cửa hàng quà tặng/quà lưu niệm, Cửa hàng tạp hóa, Dịch vụ Internet, Dịch vụ bán thức ăn sáng mang về.
Điểm đánh giá 8.4/10 dựa trên 1319 đánh giá.
Khách hay nhắc đến: Cơ sở vật chất cho trẻ em, Dịch vụ, Bể bơi, Địa điểm, Bữa sáng, Gia đình, Độ sạch sẽ, Độ thoải mái của phòng.
Các loại phòng: Phòng Superior giường King (Superior King Room); Classic Room 1 King Bed; Superior có sân (Courtyard Superior); Superior Room 2 Queen Beds; Junior Suite có giường cỡ King (Junior King Suite); Phòng Tiêu chuẩn 2 giường Queen (Standard Room 2 Queen Beds); Phòng Deluxe Có Ban Công (Deluxe Room with Balcony); Phòng Deluxe có Giường cỡ King với Bồn tắm Spa (Deluxe King Room with Spa Bath).
Gần: Câu lạc bộ gôn Leura , Gladstone Lookout, Empress Falls, Asmodeus Pool, Sylvia Falls, Flora's Bath.
